text:
The Truth Behind Truths is the twelfth English DVD volume of the original Fullmetal Alchemist anime series, released by Funimation on September 5, 2006. The DVD contains four episodes:
Episode 45: A Rotted Heart
Episode 46: Human Transmutation
Episode 47: Sealing the Homunculus
Episode 48: Goodbye

Synopsis

"The quest for the Philosopher's Stone is madness. Beings without souls live in the shadows with half-man, half-animal beasts. With Edward and Al on a journey to find the Philosopher's Stone. Edward and Al have yet to find out that the Seven Deadly Sins have the Philosopher's Stone and that they are baiting them into a trap."

Extras

In addition to the textless songs, production art and trailers which regularly appear on Fullmetal Alchemist DVDs, this volume also contains character profiles for King Bradley and Sloth.
